volatility: BillingWorkflow volatility — the sequence by which the platform registers a customer + validates their stored instrument, closes a billing period (meter usage → price → charge), and sweeps persistently-declined invoices into a delinquency signal. How that flow is ordered, gated, retried, and scheduled is what changes.

outbound.name: billingEngine
outbound.how: direct, by value — pure deterministic call in-workflow, NOT an Activity

outbound.name: interventionEngine
outbound.how: direct, by value — pure deterministic call in-workflow, NOT an Activity

outbound.name: operationsManager
outbound.how: deliverSignal (queued M→M via durableExecutionAccess) — NOT a direct call

ops.stereotype: Workflow (entry) — StartWorkflow id {customerId}:register; idempotent on workflow id
ops.note: Validate user's stored charge instrument (zero-amount auth), confirm GitHub App standing authorization, open billing aggregate, and register the per-customer closeBillingPeriod:<customerId> Temporal Schedule; registration-failure path on hard decline or App-not-installed

fields.name: CustomerID
fields.note: continuity token for the registered billing aggregate

ops.stereotype: Workflow (entry) — scheduler-triggered via closeBillingPeriod:<customerId> Schedule; id {customerId}:{periodId}:close; WorkflowIDReusePolicy: RejectDuplicate
ops.note: Meter token+hosting usage, price in-workflow via billingEngine.PriceUsage, charge user if amount>0 via billingGatewayAccess.chargeUser, consult interventionEngine.DecideOnBillingFailure on decline, record outcome via billingStateAccess.recordServiceInvoice

fields.name: Charged
fields.note: true if charge succeeded; false on zero invoice or persistent decline (Escalated path)

ops.stereotype: Workflow (entry) — scheduler-triggered via hourly billingRetrySweep Schedule; id :all:billingRetrySweep:{tickId}
ops.note: Read persistently-delinquent customers, re-charge each declined service invoice with a new execution-scoped key (genuinely new attempt), and deliver queued applyDelinquencyPolicy signal to operationsManager on persistent decline

fields.name: SignalledCustomers
fields.note: customers whose persistent decline triggered operationsManager deliverSignal; possibly empty

dataContracts: CustomerID = uuid.UUID // canonical billing aggregate identity; shared with usageAccess, billingGatewayAccess, billingStateAccess
PeriodID = string // billing period (replaces settlement-era CycleID)
BillingRef = { CustomerID CustomerID } // continuity token for registration
CloseBillingPeriodResult = { CustomerID CustomerID; PeriodID PeriodID; Charged bool } // Charged false on zero invoice (normal outcome)

framework-go/manager.Error { Kind Kind } // kinds: FailedPrecondition, NotFound, Conflict, Unauthorized, Transient, ContractMisuse — facade boundary errors only; declined charge is ContentPolicy from billingGatewayAccess, not a BillingError
errorModel: framework-go/manager.Error — caller/programmer errors at the facade boundary (FailedPrecondition, NotFound, Conflict, Unauthorized, Transient, ContractMisuse). A declined charge is NOT a BillingError — it is a terminal ContentPolicy from billingGatewayAccess routed to interventionEngine.DecideOnBillingFailure inside the workflow. A zero invoice is a normal outcome (Charged=false), not an error.
idempotency: registerCustomer: idempotent on workflow id (redundant start returns running BillingRef). closeBillingPeriod: WorkflowIDReusePolicy:RejectDuplicate + period-already-closed guard (P3). runBillingRetrySweep: Temporal Schedule firing id = workflow id. Gateway Activities: key = ${workflowId}:${activityId} — same-charge-retry dedups via Stripe; sweep re-charge uses new workflowId for genuinely-new-attempt semantics (R-1). Head-state writes: expectedVersion + idempotencyKey (dedup-first ledger probe, Conflict-retry loop per §6.5).

revisions.byActivity: D-BM (initial detailed design, re-cut from sunk settlementManager D-MST after 2026-06-09 MoR reversal)
revisions.summary: NET-NEW contract (one-directional charge-only billing). Three ops: registerCustomer, closeBillingPeriod, runBillingRetrySweep. Dropped inbound revenue/reversal Signals, merchantWebhookClient, chargeback recompute saga, payout/connected-account onboarding. Task queue: billing.

SENIOR REVIEW APPROVED AND FROZEN. App C §6 9/9 PASS, 0 WAIVED. R-1 RATIFIED with composition pins (amendment A-2): execution-scoped key ${workflowId}:${activityId} composed with deterministic charge-bearing workflow id + WorkflowIDReusePolicy:RejectDuplicate + period-already-closed guard covers all four double-charge scenarios. R-2 RATIFIED: stale bill:{customerId}:{periodId} key shapes corrected in DSL (UC5 L993, ncuc5 L1062). Amendment A-1: sourceControlAccess.installAuthorizeApp added to registerCustomer path (D-SC Q2/Q3 co-location ruling). C-BM gated on FU-BM-2 (billingStateAccess design) and FU-BM-3 (interventionEngine op-name drift).
